ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这不会产生任何效果，但可能表明你的应用中存在 bug。请改为直接赋值给 `this.state`，或在 %s 组件中定义一个带有所需 state 的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://react.dev/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s：`key` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果你需要在子组件中访问同一个值，应将其作为另一个 prop 传递。(https://react.dev/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source:
lazy: Expected the result of a dynamic import() call. Instead received: %s

Your code should look like: 
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

Did you accidentally put curly braces around the import?
ast.target:
lazy：期望得到动态 import() 调用的结果，但实际收到：%s

你的代码应如下所示：
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

你是否不小心在 import 周围加了花括号？

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: You called act(async () => ...) without await. This could lead to unexpected testing behaviour, interleaving multiple act calls and mixing their scopes. You should - await act(async () => ...);
ast.target: 你在未使用 await 的情况下调用了 act(async () => ...)。这可能导致意外的测试行为、多个 act 调用交错并混淆其作用域。你应该这样做：await act(async () => ...);

ast.name: error
ast.source:
A component suspended inside an `act` scope, but the `act` call was not awaited. When testing React components that depend on asynchronous data, you must await the result:

await act(() => ...)
ast.target:
一个组件在 `act` 作用域内被挂起，但 `act` 调用未被 await。在测试依赖异步数据的 React 组件时，你必须等待其结果：

await act(() => ...)

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.

如果你想将其写入 DOM，请改为传递字符串：%s="%s" 或 %s={value.toString()}。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect, but useEffect either doesn't have a dependency array, or one of the dependencies changes on every render.

ast.target: Profiler 必须通过 prop 指定类型为 `string` 的 "id"。但收到的类型是 `%s`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to be hydrating. This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 本应处于水合过程中。这是 React 的一个 bug。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
A tree hydrated but some attributes of the server rendered HTML didn't match the client properties. This won't be patched up. This can happen if a SSR-ed Client Component used:

- A server/client branch `if (typeof window !== 'undefined')`.
- Variable input such as `Date.now()` or `Math.random()` which changes each time it's called.
- Date formatting in a user's locale which doesn't match the server.
- External changing data without sending a snapshot of it along with the HTML.
- Invalid HTML tag nesting.

It can also happen if the client has a browser extension installed which messes with the HTML before React loaded.

%s%s
ast.target:
树已水合，但服务器渲染的 HTML 中某些属性与客户端属性不匹配。这不会被修补。以下情况可能导致此问题：

- 使用了服务器/客户端分支 `if (typeof window !== 'undefined')`。
- 使用了会在每次调用时变化的变量输入，如 `Date.now()` 或 `Math.random()`。
- 使用了与服务器不一致的用户本地化日期格式。
- 使用了外部变化的数据，但未随 HTML 一起发送其快照。
- 无效的 HTML 标签嵌套。

如果客户端安装了在 React 加载前篡改 HTML 的浏览器扩展，也可能发生此问题。

%s%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Detected multiple renderers concurrently rendering the same context provider. This is currently unsupported.
ast.target: 检测到多个渲染器在同时渲染同一个 context provider。当前不支持此情况。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to find the propagation root when scheduling context work. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在调度 context 工作时预期找到传播根。这一错误很可能由 React 的 bug 引起。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A component was suspended by an uncached promise. Creating promises inside a Client Component or hook is not yet supported, except via a Suspense-compatible library or framework.
ast.target: 组件因未缓存的 promise 而被挂起。在 Client Component 或 hook 内创建 promise 尚不支持，除非通过与 Suspense 兼容的库或框架。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
An update (setState, replaceState, or forceUpdate) was scheduled from inside an update function. Update functions should be pure, with zero side-effects. Consider using componentDidUpdate or a callback.

Please update the following component: %s
ast.target:
在更新函数内部安排了更新（setState、replaceState 或 forceUpdate）。更新函数应当是纯函数，没有副作用。请考虑使用 componentDidUpdate 或回调。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source:
React has detected a change in the order of Hooks called by %s. This will lead to bugs and errors if not fixed. For more information, read the Rules of Hooks: https://react.dev/link/rules-of-hooks

   Previous render            Next render
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ast.target:
React 检测到 %s 调用 Hooks 的顺序发生了变化。如果不修复，这将导致 bug 和错误。更多信息请阅读 Hooks 规则：https://react.dev/link/rules-of-hooks

   上一次渲染            下一次渲染
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument that is not an array (instead, received `%s`). When specified, the final argument must be an array.
ast.target: %s 收到了一个不是数组的最后一个参数（而是 `%s`）。当指定时，最后一个参数必须是数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source: ReactDOM.useFormState has been renamed to React.useActionState. Please update %s to use React.useActionState.
ast.target: ReactDOM.useFormState 已更名为 React.useActionState。请更新 %s 以使用 React.useActionState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument during this render, but not during the previous render. Even though the final argument is optional, its type cannot change between renders.
ast.target: %s 在本次渲染中收到了最后一个参数，但在上一次渲染中没有。尽管最后一个参数是可选的，其类型在渲染之间不能改变。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is an async Client Component. Only Server Components can be async at the moment. This error is often caused by accidentally adding `'use client'` to a module that was originally written for the server.
ast.target: %s 是一个异步 Client Component。目前只有 Server Components 可以是异步的。此错误通常是由于不小心在原本为服务器编写的模块中添加了 `'use client'` 导致的。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal React error: Expected static flag was missing. Please notify the React team.
ast.target: React 内部错误：缺少预期的 static 标记。请通知 React 团队。

ast.name: error
ast.source: `use` was called from inside a try/catch block. This is not allowed and can lead to unexpected behavior. To handle errors triggered by `use`, wrap your component in a error boundary.
ast.target: `use` 在 try/catch 块内部被调用。这是不允许的，可能导致意外行为。要处理由 `use` 触发的错误，请将组件包裹在错误边界中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal error: Expected work-in-progress queue to be a clone. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 内部错误：期望 work-in-progress 队列为克隆。这是 React 的一个 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The result of getServerSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop
ast.target: getServerSnapshot 的结果应当被缓存以避免无限循环

ast.name: error
ast.source: The result of getSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop
ast.target: getSnapshot 的结果应当被缓存以避免无限循环

ast.name: error
ast.source: An async function with useActionState was called outside of a transition. This is likely not what you intended (for example, isPending will not update correctly). Either call the returned function inside startTransition, or pass it to an `action` or `formAction` prop.
ast.target: 带有 useActionState 的异步函数在 transition 之外被调用。这很可能不是你想要的（例如，isPending 将不会正确更新）。请在 startTransition 内调用返回的函数，或将其传给 `action` 或 `formAction` 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() first argument to either be a ref callback or React.createRef() object. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: useImperativeHandle() 的第一个参数应当是 ref 回调或 React.createRef() 对象。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() second argument to be a function that creates a handle. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: useImperativeHandle() 的第二个参数应当是创建 handle 的函数。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: requestFormReset was called outside a transition or action. To fix, move to an action, or wrap with startTransition.
ast.target: requestFormReset 在 transition 或 action 之外被调用。要修复，请移入 action，或用 startTransition 包裹。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The seed argument is not enabled outside experimental channels.
ast.target: seed 参数在实验渠道之外未启用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: State updates from the useState() and useReducer() Hooks don't support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in the component body with useEffect().
ast.target: 来自 useState() 和 useReducer() Hooks 的状态更新不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体内使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: An optimistic state update occurred outside a transition or action. To fix, move the update to an action, or wrap with startTransition.
ast.target: 乐观状态更新发生在 transition 或 action 之外。要修复，请将更新移入 action，或用 startTransition 包裹。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot call startTransition while rendering.
ast.target: 渲染期间不能调用 startTransition。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid prop `%s` supplied to `React.Fragment`. React.Fragment can only have `key` and `children` props.
ast.target: 向 `React.Fragment` 传入了无效的 prop `%s`。React.Fragment 只能有 `key` 和 `children` 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Functions are not valid as a React child. This may happen if you return %s instead of <%s /> from render. Or maybe you meant to call this function rather than return it.
  root.render(%s)
ast.target:
函数不能作为 React 子元素。如果你在 render 中返回了 %s 而不是 <%s />，就可能发生这种情况。或者你可能是想调用该函数而不是返回它。
  root.render(%s)

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Functions are not valid as a React child. This may happen if you return %s instead of <%s /> from render. Or maybe you meant to call this function rather than return it.
  <%s>{%s}</%s>
ast.target:
函数不能作为 React 子元素。如果你在 render 中返回了 %s 而不是 <%s />，就可能发生这种情况。或者你可能是想调用该函数而不是返回它。
  <%s>{%s}</%s>

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Symbols are not valid as a React child.
  root.render(%s)
ast.target:
Symbol 不能作为 React 子元素。
  root.render(%s)

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Symbols are not valid as a React child.
  <%s>%s</%s>
ast.target:
Symbol 不能作为 React 子元素。
  <%s>%s</%s>

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encountered two children with the same key, `%s`. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.
ast.target: 遇到两个具有相同 key `%s` 的子元素。key 应该是唯一的，以便组件在更新间保持其身份。非唯一 key 可能导致子元素被重复和/或被省略——该行为不受支持，并可能在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected the last optional `callback` argument to be a function. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: 期望最后一个可选的 `callback` 参数为函数。实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getDerivedStateFromProps(): A valid state object (or null) must be returned. You have returned undefined.
ast.target: %s.getDerivedStateFromProps(): 必须返回一个有效的 state 对象（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.shouldComponentUpdate(): Returned undefined instead of a boolean value. Make sure to return true or false.
ast.target: %s.shouldComponentUpdate(): 返回了 undefined 而不是布尔值。请确保返回 true 或 false。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): 直接给 this.state 赋值已被弃用（组件构造函数内部除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
%o

%s

%s
ast.target:
%o

%s

%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to have a render method, but doesn't extend React.Component. This is likely to cause errors. Change %s to extend React.Component instead.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎有 render 方法，但未继承 React.Component。这很可能会导致错误。请让 %s 继承 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s defines an invalid contextType. contextType should point to the Context object returned by React.createContext().%s
ast.target: %s 定义了无效的 contextType。contextType 应指向 React.createContext() 返回的 Context 对象。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: `%s` uses `getDerivedStateFromProps` but its initial state is %s. This is not recommended. Instead, define the initial state by assigning an object to `this.state` in the constructor of `%s`. This ensures that `getDerivedStateFromProps` arguments have a consistent shape.
ast.target: `%s` 使用了 `getDerivedStateFromProps`，但其初始 state 为 %s。这不推荐。请在 `%s` 的构造函数中通过给 `this.state` 赋值对象来定义初始 state。这可确保 `getDerivedStateFromProps` 参数具有一致的结构。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No `render` method found on the %s instance: did you accidentally return an object from the constructor?
ast.target: 在 %s 实例上未找到 `render` 方法：你是否在构造函数中意外返回了一个对象？

ast.name: error
ast.source: No `render` method found on the %s instance: you may have forgotten to define `render`.
ast.target: 在 %s 实例上未找到 `render` 方法：你可能忘了定义 `render`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: getInitialState was defined on %s, a plain JavaScript class. This is only supported for classes created using React.createClass. Did you mean to define a state property instead?
ast.target: 在 %s（一个普通的 JavaScript 类）上定义了 getInitialState。这仅支持使用 React.createClass 创建的类。你是想改为定义 state 属性吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: getDefaultProps was defined on %s, a plain JavaScript class. This is only supported for classes created using React.createClass. Use a static property to define defaultProps instead.
ast.target: 在 %s（一个普通的 JavaScript 类）上定义了 getDefaultProps。这仅支持使用 React.createClass 创建的类。请改用静态属性来定义 defaultProps。

ast.name: error
ast.source: contextType was defined as an instance property on %s. Use a static property to define contextType instead.
ast.target: contextType 被定义为 %s 的实例属性。请改用静态属性来定义 contextType。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentShouldUpdate(). Did you mean shouldComponentUpdate()? The name is phrased as a question because the function is expected to return a value.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentShouldUpdate() 的方法。你是想写 shouldComponentUpdate() 吗？该名称以疑问形式表述，因为该函数需要返回一个值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called shouldComponentUpdate(). shouldComponentUpdate should not be used when extending React.PureComponent. Please extend React.Component if shouldComponentUpdate is used.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 shouldComponentUpdate() 的方法。扩展 React.PureComponent 时不应使用 shouldComponentUpdate。如果要使用 shouldComponentUpdate，请扩展 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidUnmount(). But there is no such lifecycle method. Did you mean componentWillUnmount()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidUnmount() 的方法。但没有这个生命周期方法。你是想写 componentWillUnmount() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidReceiveProps(). But there is no such lifecycle method. If you meant to update the state in response to changing props, use componentWillReceiveProps(). If you meant to fetch data or run side-effects or mutations after React has updated the UI, use componentDidUpdate().
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidReceiveProps() 的方法。但没有这个生命周期方法。如果你想在 props 变化时更新 state，请使用 componentWillReceiveProps()。如果你想在 React 更新 UI 后获取数据或执行副作用或变更，请使用 componentDidUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: When calling super() in `%s`, make sure to pass up the same props that your component's constructor was passed.
ast.target: 在 `%s` 中调用 super() 时，请确保向上传递与组件构造函数接收到的相同 props。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Setting defaultProps as an instance property on %s is not supported and will be ignored. Instead, define defaultProps as a static property on %s.
ast.target: 在 %s 上将 defaultProps 设置为实例属性不受支持，并会被忽略。请改在 %s 上将 defaultProps 定义为静态属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() should be used with componentDidUpdate(). This component defines getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() only.
ast.target: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 应与 componentDidUpdate() 一起使用。该组件仅定义了 getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromProps() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s: getDerivedStateFromProps() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请将其声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromError() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s: getDerivedStateFromError() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请将其声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() is defined as a static method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as an instance method.
ast.target: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 被定义为静态方法，将被忽略。请将其声明为实例方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.state: must be set to an object or null
ast.target: %s.state：必须设置为对象或 null

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getChildContext(): childContextTypes must be defined in order to use getChildContext().
ast.target: %s.getChildContext()：必须定义 childContextTypes 才能使用 getChildContext()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: It is not recommended to assign props directly to state because updates to props won't be reflected in state. In most cases, it is better to use props directly.
ast.target: %s：不建议将 props 直接赋值给 state，因为对 props 的更新不会反映到 state 中。在大多数情况下，最好直接使用 props。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillMount(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillMount()：直接赋值给 this.state 已被弃用（组件构造函数内部除外）。请改用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: It looks like %s is reassigning its own `this.props` while rendering. This is not supported and can lead to confusing bugs.
ast.target: 看起来 %s 在渲染时重新赋值了自己的 `this.props`。这是不受支持的，可能导致难以理解的错误。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
childContextTypes cannot be defined on a function component.
  %s.childContextTypes = ...
ast.target:
不能在函数组件上定义 childContextTypes。
  %s.childContextTypes = ...

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support getDerivedStateFromProps.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 getDerivedStateFromProps。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support contextType.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 contextType。

ast.name: error
ast.source: We should not be hydrating here. This is a bug in React. Please file a bug.
ast.target: 这里不应该进行水合。这是 React 的一个错误。请提交 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A nested %s was passed to row #%s in <SuspenseList />. Wrap it in an additional SuspenseList to configure its revealOrder: <SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 的第 #%s 行传入了嵌套的 %s。请再包一层 SuspenseList 来配置它的 revealOrder：<SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Use lowercase "%s" instead.
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的有效 revealOrder 值。请改用小写的 "%s"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. React uses the -s suffix in the spelling. Use "%ss" instead.
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的有效 revealOrder 值。React 在拼写中使用 -s 后缀。请改用 "%ss"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 支持的 revealOrder。你是指 "together"、"forwards" 还是 "backwards"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is not a supported value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: %s 不是 <SuspenseList /> 支持的 revealOrder 值。你是指 "together"、"forwards" 还是 "backwards"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported value for tail on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "collapsed" or "hidden"?
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 支持的 tail 值。你是指 "collapsed" 还是 "hidden"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: <SuspenseList tail="%s" /> is only valid if revealOrder is "forwards" or "backwards". Did you mean to specify revealOrder="forwards"?
ast.target: 只有在 revealOrder 为 "forwards" 或 "backwards" 时，<SuspenseList tail="%s" /> 才有效。你是想指定 revealOrder="forwards" 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A single row was passed to a <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" />. This is not useful since it needs multiple rows. Did you mean to pass multiple children or an array?
ast.target: 向 <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" /> 传入了单行。这没有意义，因为它需要多行。你是想传入多个子元素或数组吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `value` prop is required for the `<Context.Provider>`. Did you misspell it or forget to pass it?
ast.target: `<Context.Provider>` 需要 `value` 属性。你是否拼写错误或忘记传递了它？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A context consumer was rendered with multiple children, or a child that isn't a function. A context consumer expects a single child that is a function. If you did pass a function, make sure there is no trailing or leading whitespace around it.
ast.target: 上下文 consumer 被渲染为多个子元素，或包含一个非函数子元素。上下文 consumer 期望一个函数类型的单一子元素。如果你确实传入了函数，请确保它周围没有前导或尾随空白。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The tag <%s> is unrecognized in this browser. If you meant to render a React component, start its name with an uppercase letter.
ast.target: 此浏览器无法识别标签 <%s>。如果你想渲染 React 组件，请以大写字母开头命名。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s must not return anything besides a function, which is used for clean-up.%s
ast.target: %s 不能返回除用于清理的函数以外的任何内容。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate(): A snapshot value (or null) must be returned. You have returned undefined.
ast.target: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()：必须返回快照值（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error
ast.source: String refs are no longer supported.
ast.target: 不再支持字符串 refs。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected ref object provided for %s. Use either a ref-setter function or React.createRef().
ast.target: 为 %s 提供了意外的 ref 对象。请使用 ref 设置函数或 React.createRef()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected host component type. Expected a form. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 宿主组件类型异常。期望的是 form。这是 React 的一个错误。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The current testing environment is not configured to support act(...)
ast.target: 当前测试环境未配置为支持 act(...)

ast.name: error
ast.source: useInsertionEffect must not schedule updates.
ast.target: useInsertionEffect 不得安排更新。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update a component (`%s`) while rendering a different component (`%s`). To locate the bad setState() call inside `%s`, follow the stack trace as described in https://react.dev/link/setstate-in-render
ast.target: 无法在渲染另一个组件（`%s`）时更新组件（`%s`）。要定位 `%s` 内部错误的 setState() 调用，请按照 https://react.dev/link/setstate-in-render 中描述的堆栈跟踪进行定位。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update during an existing state transition (such as within `render`). Render methods should be a pure function of props and state.
ast.target: 无法在现有的状态转换过程中进行更新（例如在 `render` 中）。渲染方法应是 props 和 state 的纯函数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected type of fiber triggered a suspensey commit. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 意外的 fiber 类型触发了 suspense 提交。这是 React 的一个错误。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are accessing "digest" from the errorInfo object passed to onRecoverableError. This property is no longer provided as part of errorInfo but can be accessed as a property of the Error instance itself.
ast.target: 你正在从传递给 onRecoverableError 的 errorInfo 对象中访问 "digest"。该属性已不再作为 errorInfo 的一部分提供，但可以作为 Error 实例本身的属性访问。

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: Can't perform a React state update on a component that hasn't mounted yet. This indicates that you have a side-effect in your render function that asynchronously later calls tries to update the component. Move this work to useEffect instead.
ast.target: 无法对尚未挂载的组件执行 React 状态更新。这表明你在 render 函数中有副作用，之后异步调用尝试更新组件。请将这项工作移到 useEffect 中。

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: Did not expect a listenToNonDelegatedEvent() call for "%s". This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 未预期对 "%s" 调用 listenToNonDelegatedEvent()。这是 React 的一个错误。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Did not expect a listenToNativeEvent() call for "%s" in the bubble phase. This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 未预期在冒泡阶段对 "%s" 调用 listenToNativeEvent()。这是 React 的一个错误。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A component is `contentEditable` and contains `children` managed by React. It is now your responsibility to guarantee that none of those nodes are unexpectedly modified or duplicated. This is probably not intentional.
ast.target: 某组件为 `contentEditable` 且包含由 React 管理的 `children`。你现在需要确保这些节点不会被意外修改或重复。这可能不是有意为之。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Expected `%s` listener to be a function, instead got `false`.

If you used to conditionally omit it with %s={condition && value}, pass %s={condition ? value : undefined} instead.
ast.target:
期望 `%s` 监听器为函数，但得到的是 `false`。

如果你之前通过 %s={condition && value} 有条件地省略它，请改为传递 %s={condition ? value : undefined}。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected `%s` listener to be a function, instead got a value of `%s` type.
ast.target: 期望 `%s` 监听器为函数，但得到的是 `%s` 类型的值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The provided HTML markup uses a value of unsupported type %s. This value must be coerced to a string before using it here.
ast.target: 提供的 HTML 标记使用了不受支持的类型 %s 的值。在此使用之前必须将该值强制转换为字符串。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You can only pass the formAction prop to <input> or <button>. Use the action prop on <form>.
ast.target: 只能将 formAction 属性传给 <input> 或 <button>。请在 <form> 上使用 action 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot specify a encType or method for a form that specifies a function as the action. React provides those automatically. They will get overridden.
ast.target: 为 action 指定为函数的表单不能指定 encType 或 method。React 会自动提供它们，并将被覆盖。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot specify a target for a form that specifies a function as the action. The function will always be executed in the same window.
ast.target: 为 action 指定为函数的表单不能指定 target。该函数总是在同一窗口中执行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You can only pass the action prop to <form>. Use the formAction prop on <input> or <button>.
ast.target: 只能将 action 属性传给 <form>。请在 <input> 或 <button> 上使用 formAction 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot specify a "name" prop for a button that specifies a function as a formAction. React needs it to encode which action should be invoked. It will get overridden.
ast.target: 为 formAction 指定为函数的按钮不能指定 "name" 属性。React 需要它来编码应调用的 action，因此它会被覆盖。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot specify a formEncType or formMethod for a button that specifies a function as a formAction. React provides those automatically. They will get overridden.
ast.target: 为 formAction 指定为函数的按钮不能指定 formEncType 或 formMethod。React 会自动提供它们，并将被覆盖。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot specify a formTarget for a button that specifies a function as a formAction. The function will always be executed in the same window.
ast.target: 为 formAction 指定为函数的按钮不能指定 formTarget。该函数总是在同一窗口中执行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A button can only specify a formAction along with type="submit" or no type.
ast.target: 按钮只能在 type="submit" 或未指定 type 时指定 formAction。

ast.name: error
ast.source: An input can only specify a formAction along with type="submit" or type="image".
ast.target: 输入框只能在 type="submit" 或 type="image" 时指定 formAction。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You can only pass the action prop to <form>.
ast.target: 只能将 action 属性传给 <form>。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You can only pass the formAction prop to <input> or <button>.
ast.target: 你只能将 formAction 属性传递给 <input> 或 <button>。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update the "is" prop after it has been initialized.
ast.target: 初始化后无法更新 "is" 属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Assignment to read-only property will result in a no-op: `%s`
ast.target: 对只读属性的赋值将不会产生任何效果：`%s`

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are mounting a new %s component when a previous one has not first unmounted. It is an error to render more than one %s component at a time and attributes and children of these components will likely fail in unpredictable ways. Please only render a single instance of <%s> and if you need to mount a new one, ensure any previous ones have unmounted first.
ast.target: 你正在挂载一个新的 %s 组件，而之前的组件尚未卸载。一次渲染多个 %s 组件是错误的，这些组件的属性和子元素可能会以不可预测的方式失败。请只渲染一个 <%s> 实例，如需挂载新的实例，请确保之前的实例已先卸载。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot render a <style> outside the main document without knowing its precedence and a unique href key. React can hoist and deduplicate <style> tags if you provide a `precedence` prop along with an `href` prop that does not conflict with the `href` values used in any other hoisted <style> or <link rel="stylesheet" ...> tags.  Note that hoisting <style> tags is considered an advanced feature that most will not use directly. Consider moving the <style> tag to the <head> or consider adding a `precedence="default"` and `href="some unique resource identifier"`.
ast.target: 在不知道其 precedence 和唯一的 href 键的情况下，无法在主文档之外渲染 <style>。如果你提供 `precedence` 属性，并同时提供一个不会与任何其他被提升的 <style> 或 <link rel="stylesheet" ...> 标签使用的 `href` 值冲突的 `href` 属性，React 可以提升并去重 <style> 标签。请注意，提升 <style> 标签被视为高级功能，大多数人不会直接使用。请考虑将 <style> 标签移到 <head>，或添加 `precedence="default"` 和 `href="some unique resource identifier"`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot render a <link> outside the main document without a `rel` and `href` prop. Try adding a `rel` and/or `href` prop to this <link> or moving the link into the <head> tag
ast.target: 没有 `rel` 和 `href` 属性时无法在主文档之外渲染 <link>。请尝试为该 <link> 添加 `rel` 和/或 `href` 属性，或将该链接移到 <head> 标签中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot render a <link rel="stylesheet" /> outside the main document without knowing its precedence. Consider adding precedence="default" or moving it into the root <head> tag.
ast.target: 在不知道其 precedence 的情况下，无法在主文档之外渲染 <link rel="stylesheet" />。请考虑添加 precedence="default" 或将其移到根 <head> 标签中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot render a sync or defer <script> outside the main document without knowing its order. Try adding async="" or moving it into the root <head> tag.
ast.target: 在不知道其顺序的情况下，无法在主文档之外渲染 sync 或 defer 的 <script>。请尝试添加 async="" 或将其移到根 <head> 标签中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot render <%s> outside the main document. Try moving it into the root <head> tag.
ast.target: 无法在主文档之外渲染 <%s>。请尝试将其移到根 <head> 标签中。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Render methods should be a pure function of props and state; triggering nested component updates from render is not allowed. If necessary, trigger nested updates in componentDidUpdate.

Check the render method of %s.
ast.target:
render 方法应是 props 和 state 的纯函数；不允许在 render 中触发嵌套组件更新。如有必要，请在 componentDidUpdate 中触发嵌套更新。

请检查 %s 的 render 方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected currently replaying event to be null. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 预期当前正在重放的事件为 null。此错误很可能是 React 的 bug 引起的。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected currently replaying event to not be null. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 预期当前正在重放的事件不为 null。此错误很可能是 React 的 bug 引起的。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOMClient.createRoot() on a container that was previously passed to ReactDOM.render(). This is not supported.
ast.target: 你正在对之前传给 ReactDOM.render() 的容器调用 ReactDOMClient.createRoot()。这是不受支持的。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOMClient.createRoot() on a container that has already been passed to createRoot() before. Instead, call root.render() on the existing root instead if you want to update it.
ast.target: 你正在对已经传给 createRoot() 的容器调用 ReactDOMClient.createRoot()。如果你想更新它，请在现有的 root 上调用 root.render()。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillMount in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://react.dev/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move code with side effects to componentDidMount, and set initial state in the constructor.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
在严格模式下使用 UNSAFE_componentWillMount 不被推荐，且可能表明你的代码存在 bug。详情请参见 https://react.dev/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将有副作用的代码移到 componentDidMount 中，并在构造函数中设置初始 state。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://react.dev/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move data fetching code or side effects to componentDidUpdate.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
在严格模式下使用 UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate 不被推荐，且可能表明你的代码存在 bug。详情请参见 https://react.dev/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将数据获取代码或副作用移到 componentDidUpdate 中。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to find a StrictMode component in a strict mode tree. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 预期在严格模式树中找到 StrictMode 组件。此错误很可能是 React 的 bug 引起的。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Legacy context API has been detected within a strict-mode tree.

The old API will be supported in all 16.x releases, but applications using it should migrate to the new version.

Please update the following components: %s

Learn more about this warning here: https://react.dev/link/legacy-context
ast.target:
在严格模式树中检测到旧版 context API。

旧 API 将在所有 16.x 版本中受支持，但使用它的应用应迁移到新版本。

请更新以下组件：%s

在此了解更多关于此警告的信息：https://react.dev/link/legacy-context

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal React error: A listener was unexpectedly attached to a "noop" thenable. This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: React 内部错误：监听器意外地附加到了一个 "noop" thenable 上。这是 React 的 bug。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected only SimpleEffects when enableUseEffectCRUDOverload is disabled, got %s
ast.target: 在禁用 enableUseEffectCRUDOverload 时仅应有 SimpleEffects，但得到 %s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop.%s%s See https://react.dev/link/warning-keys for more information.
ast.target: 列表中的每个子元素都应该有唯一的 "key" 属性。%s%s 更多信息请参见 https://react.dev/link/warning-keys。

ast.name: error
ast.source: does not support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: 不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体中使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You passed a container to the second argument of root.render(...). You don't need to pass it again since you already passed it to create the root.
ast.target: 你把一个容器传给了 root.render(...) 的第二个参数。你不需要再次传递它，因为你已经在创建 root 时传过了。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You passed a second argument to root.render(...) but it only accepts one argument.
ast.target: 你向 root.render(...) 传入了第二个参数，但它只接受一个参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: does not support a callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: 不支持回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体中使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: React depends on Map and Set built-in types. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://react.dev/link/react-polyfills
ast.target: React 依赖 Map 和 Set 内置类型。请确保在旧版浏览器中加载 polyfill。https://react.dev/link/react-polyfills

ast.name: error
ast.source: Must provide initial children as second argument to hydrateRoot. Example usage: hydrateRoot(domContainer, <App />)
ast.target: 必须将初始 children 作为 hydrateRoot 的第二个参数提供。示例用法：hydrateRoot(domContainer, <App />)

ast.name: error
ast.source: React.jsx: Static children should always be an array. You are likely explicitly calling React.jsxs or React.jsxDEV. Use the Babel transform instead.
ast.target: React.jsx：静态 children 应始终为数组。你可能在显式调用 React.jsxs 或 React.jsxDEV。请改用 Babel 转换。

setDesc

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Your app (or one of its dependencies) is using an outdated JSX transform. Update to the modern JSX transform for faster performance: https://react.dev/link/new-jsx-transform

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected a large number of updates inside startTransition. If this is due to a subscription please re-write it to use React provided hooks. Otherwise concurrent mode guarantees are off the table.
ast.target: 在 startTransition 内检测到大量更新。如果这是由于订阅导致的，请重写为使用 React 提供的 Hook。否则并发模式的保证将不再适用。

ast.target: React Hook useEffect 需要一个 effect 回调。你是否忘记向该 Hook 传入回调？

ast.target: React Hook useLayoutEffect 需要一个 effect 回调。你是否忘记向该 Hook 传入回调？
